issue.title: Require milestone migration guide and base-branch setup for PermissionHandlingUpdates

comment.body:
> *The library  io.github.nishkarsh:android-permissions still functioning well. We can either

@Ma7moud3ly 

Is this the most recent version?
https://github.com/nishkarsh/android-permissions/

If so, I'd say moving to a modern native approach is necessary as the lib is 4 years old now. If you think it still works fine despite this, then yes, we can keep this in NonPriority and work on it later.
